# Sahil Verma — Specialist Programmer · Full Stack Engineer

Personal portfolio of Sahil Verma, a Full Stack Engineer based in London, United Kingdom.
This file gives LLMs and AI search engines a concise, factual summary of who Sahil is, what he does, and how to find more.

## Identity
- Name: Sahil Verma
- Current role: Specialist Programmer at Infosys (London, United Kingdom)
- Discipline: Full Stack Engineer (React, Angular, Node.js, Cloud, Opensource)
- Website: https://sahilverma.in
- Email: hello@sahilverma.in
- GitHub: https://github.com/sahil04
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-verma-421133147/
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/sahilv04
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ess__vee/
- Blog: https://sahilverma.in/blog

## Summary
Sahil is a Specialist Programmer at Infosys (London) leading a team of around five engineers
on enterprise-level, highly responsive applications. He is an AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
and an R3 Corda Certified Developer, with prior experience as Technical Lead at Webmob Software
Solutions (financial domain) and Software Developer at OATI (power domain).

## Tagline
"A passionate individual who always thrives to work on end to end products which develop sustainable
and scalable social and technical systems to create impact."

## Experience
- Specialist Programmer — Infosys, London, United Kingdom (April 2021 — Present)
  Leads a team of ~5 engineers, develops and maintains enterprise-level highly responsive
  applications, runs scrum process and code reviews.
- Technical Lead — Webmob Software Solutions Pvt Ltd, Mohali, Punjab, India (Jan 2019 — April 2021)
  Led a team of ~5 engineers building enterprise applications in the financial domain. Ran scrum,
  conducted technical interviews and contributed to recruitment.
- Software Developer — Open Access Technology Pvt Ltd (OATI), Mohali, Punjab, India (July 2016 — Dec 2018)
  Member of the core Deal Entry product team. Developed and maintained enterprise applications
  for power-domain clients.

## Education
- B.Tech in Computer Engineering — Punjabi University, Patiala, India (2016 — 2020)
  Studied Data Structures, Algorithms, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Architecture.
  Member of the organizing and discipline committee of the techno-cultural fest.

## Certifications
- AWS Certified AI Practitioner — Amazon Web Services (issued Sep 2024, expires Sep 2027)
- AWS Certified AI Practitioner — Early Adopter — Amazon Web Services (issued Sep 2024)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals — Microsoft (issued Aug 2024)
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect — Associate — Amazon Web Services (issued Jul 2024, expires Jul 2027)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals — Microsoft (issued Jul 2024)
- Zero to Merge — Infosys (issued Jul 2024)
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner — Amazon Web Services (issued Jan 2023, expires Jan 2026)
- Corda Certified Developer — R3 (issued Oct 2019)
- Infosys Certified React Native Developer — Infosys

## Technologies
- Frontend: React, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Redux, Next.js
- Backend: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, MongoDB, SQL, Microservices
- Cloud / DevOps: AWS, CI/CD, Docker, Linux, Observability
- Blockchain: R3 Corda, CorDapps, distributed ledgers, smart contracts
- Tooling: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Webpack, Vite, Jest, Cypress
- Leadership: team leadership, scrum, code review culture, technical interviewing, estimation

## Services
- React development
- Angular development
- Node.js & API development
- Cloud engineering on AWS
- Opensource development
- Technical leadership

## Availability
"I am available on almost every social media. You can message me, I will reply within 24 hours.
I can help you with React, Angular, NodeJS, Cloud and Opensource Development."
